ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company */,
  "is_primary_classification" INTEGER /* Indicates if the company is primary in its classification */,
  "mkt_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ind_rev" REAL /* Industry revenue of the company */,
  "percent_tot_rev" REAL /* Percentage of total revenue */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "headquarters_location" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry to which the company belongs */,
  "primary_classification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary classification of the company */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the company is active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the company's data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "parent_industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent industry */,
  "industry_type" TEXT /* Type of the industry */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the industry is active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the industry's data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_industries" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  "primary_classification" INTEGER /* Indicates if the industry is the primary classification for the company */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the mapping was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id", "industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revenue_distribution" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue distribution entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the revenue data */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the revenue data */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue amount */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of total revenue */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the revenue data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the revenue data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_distribution_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_year" INTEGER /* Year of the report */,
  "report_quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the report was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the access log was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "mkt_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ind_rev" REAL /* Industry revenue of the company */,
  "percent_tot_rev" REAL /* Percentage of total revenue */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the data entry */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the historical data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the historical data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
